title: Flatten and Sum
description: Flatten nested arrays and sum their elements

parts.title: Flatten a nested array
parts.description: Implement flattenArray(arr) / flatten_array(arr) that takes a deeply nested array and returns a flat version.

parts.title: Sum nested elements without flattening
parts.description: Implement sumNested(arr) / sum_nested(arr) that takes a deeply nested array and returns the sum of all numbers — without flattening first. Both functions must continue to pass their tests.
